title: Can't change group of last item in My Work since it's off screen
excerpt: It’s impossible to change the group of the last item in ‘My Work’ since the popover falls of the screen. It’s not possible to scroll down further.

posts.author: AndreasF (Andreas Furster)
posts.cookedHtml:
It’s impossible to change the group of the last item in ‘My Work’ since the popover falls of the screen. It’s not possible to scroll down further.
